title: arnica parryi var. sonnei
intro: Arnica parryi var. sonnei, also known as western mountain arnica, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the sunflower family and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including the reduction of swelling and pain, as well as the promotion of wound healing and the treatment of bruises and sprains. Herbal preparations of Arnica parryi var. sonnei include topical creams and oils, which can be used to soothe and calm skin irritations, and tinctures or homeopathic remedies, which can be taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
